lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਦੂਜੀ ਤਰਫ ਹੈ ਵੇਖਹੁ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh doojee taraf hai vekhahu nadar nihaal |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh is on the wrong side. You can see this with your own eyes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਾਹੀ ਫਾਥੇ ਮਿਰਗ ਜਿਉ ਸਿਰਿ ਦੀਸੈ ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: faahee faathe mirag jiau sir deesai jamakaal |
lines.english: He is caught in the trap like the deer; the Messenger of Death hovers over his head.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਨੀ ਅਖੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਜਿਚਰੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਨ ਕਰੇ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: enee akhee nadar na aavee jichar sabad na kare beechaar |
lines.english: These cannot be seen with your eyes, until you contemplate the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੁਧਿਆ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਬੁਰੀ ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਵਿਕਰਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: khudhiaa trisanaa nindaa buree kaam krodh vikaraal |
lines.english: Hunger, thirst and slander are evil; sexual desire and anger are horrible.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਲੁ ਰਹੈ ਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਗੁਰ ਪਉੜੀ ਬੋਹਿਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: mool rahai gur seviai gur paurree bohith |
lines.english: Serving the Guru, his capital is preserved. The Guru is the ladder and the boat.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੰਤੋਖੀਆਂ ਚੂਕੈ ਆਲ ਜੰਜਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: tudh bhaavai santokheean chookai aal janjaal |
lines.english: Whoever is pleasing to You is content; all his entanglements are gone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਲਗੀ ਤਤੁ ਲੈ ਤੂੰ ਸਚਾ ਮਨਿ ਸਚੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak lagee tat lai toon sachaa man sach |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, whoever is attached to the Lord receives the essence; O True Lord, You are found when the mind is true. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੂੜਉ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਸਭਿ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਚਉ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: roorrau tthaakur naanakaa sabh sukh saachau naam |2|
lines.english: Our Lord and Master is so beautiful, O Nanak; all comfort and peace are in the Name of the True Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇਕੋ ਪਾਧਰੁ ਹੇਕੁ ਦਰੁ ਗੁਰ ਪਉੜੀ ਨਿਜ ਥਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: heko paadhar hek dar gur paurree nij thaan |
lines.english: There is one path and one door. The Guru is the ladder to reach one's own place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੀਨੑੈ ਆਪੁ ਸਾਜਿ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aapeenai aap saaj aap pachhaaniaa |
lines.english: He Himself created Himself; He Himself understands Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਬਰੁ ਧਰਤਿ ਵਿਛੋੜਿ ਚੰਦੋਆ ਤਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: anbar dharat vichhorr chandoaa taaniaa |
lines.english: Separating the sky and the earth, He has spread out His canopy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਰਜੁ ਚੰਦੁ ਉਪਾਇ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sooraj chand upaae jot samaaniaa |
lines.english: Creating the sun and the moon, He infused His Light into them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਥੰਮੑਾ ਗਗਨੁ ਰਹਾਇ ਸਬਦੁ ਨੀਸਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: vin thamaa gagan rahaae sabad neesaaniaa |
lines.english: Without any pillars, He supports the sky, through the insignia of His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਏ ਰਾਤਿ ਦਿਨੰਤੁ ਚੋਜ ਵਿਡਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: kee raat dinant choj viddaaniaa |
lines.english: He created the night and the day; Wondrous are His miraculous plays.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਰਥ ਧਰਮ ਵੀਚਾਰ ਨਾਵਣ ਪੁਰਬਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: teerath dharam veechaar naavan purabaaniaa |
lines.english: He created the sacred shrines of pilgrimage, where people contemplate righteousness and Dharma, and take cleansing baths on special occasions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਸਰਿ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ਕਿ ਆਖਿ ਵਖਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: tudh sar avar na koe ki aakh vakhaaniaa |
lines.english: There is no other equal to You; how can we speak and describe You?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਤਖਤਿ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ਹੋਰ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sachai takhat nivaas hor aavan jaaniaa |1|
lines.english: You are seated on the throne of Truth; all others come and go in reincarnation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਗਾਂ ਮਿਰਗਾਂ ਮਛੀਆਂ ਰਸੀਆਂ ਘਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naagaan miragaan machheean raseean ghar dhan hoe |1|
lines.english: the snake, the deer, the fish and the wealthy people who seek pleasure. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਵਣਿ ਜੇ ਵਸੈ ਚਹੁ ਓਮਾਹਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak saavan je vasai chahu omaahaa hoe |
lines.english: O Nanak, when it rains in the month of Saawan, four are delighted:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਵਣਿ ਜੇ ਵਸੈ ਚਹੁ ਵੇਛੋੜਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak saavan je vasai chahu vechhorraa hoe |
lines.english: O Nanak, when it rains in the month of Saawan, four suffer the pains of separation:

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਈ ਪੁਤਾ ਨਿਰਧਨਾ ਪੰਥੀ ਚਾਕਰੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gaaee putaa niradhanaa panthee chaakar hoe |2|
lines.english: the cow's calves, the poor, the travellers and the servants. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮੈ ਵਡਾ ਕਹਾਇ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: brahamai vaddaa kahaae ant na paaeaa |
lines.english: Brahma is called great, but even he does not know Your limits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸਚਾ ਸਚਿਆਰੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਚੁ ਵਰਤਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: too sachaa sachiaar jin sach varataaeaa |
lines.english: You are True, O True Lord; You dispense True Justice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੈਠਾ ਤਾੜੀ ਲਾਇ ਕਵਲੁ ਛਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: baitthaa taarree laae kaval chhapaaeaa |
lines.english: Like a lotus, You sit in the primal celestial trance; You are hidden from view.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਾਪੁ ਨ ਮਾਇ ਕਿਨਿ ਤੂ ਜਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naa tis baap na maae kin too jaaeaa |
lines.english: You have no father or mother; who gave birth to You?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਰੂਪੁ ਨ ਰੇਖ ਵਰਨ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naa tis roop na rekh varan sabaaeaa |
lines.english: You have no form or feature; You transcend all social classes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਭੁਖ ਪਿਆਸ ਰਜਾ ਧਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naa tis bhukh piaas rajaa dhaaeaa |
lines.english: You have no hunger or thirst; You are satisfied and satiated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਹਿ ਆਪੁ ਸਮੋਇ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਰਤਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur meh aap samoe sabad varataaeaa |
lines.english: You have merged Yourself into the Guru; You are pervading through the Word of Your Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਹੀ ਪਤੀਆਇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sache hee pateeae sach samaaeaa |2|
lines.english: When he is pleasing to the True Lord, the mortal merges in Truth. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੋਲਾ ਵੈਦੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਈ ਕਰਕ ਕਲੇਜੇ ਮਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bholaa vaid na jaanee karak kaleje maeh |1|
lines.english: The foolish physician did not know that the pain was in the mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੈਦੁ ਬੁਲਾਇਆ ਵੈਦਗੀ ਪਕੜਿ ਢੰਢੋਲੇ ਬਾਂਹ ॥
lines.translit: vaid bulaaeaa vaidagee pakarr dtandtole baanh |
lines.english: The physician was called in; he touched my arm and felt my pulse.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੈਦਾ ਵੈਦੁ ਸੁਵੈਦੁ ਤੂ ਪਹਿਲਾਂ ਰੋਗੁ ਪਛਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: vaidaa vaid suvaid too pahilaan rog pachhaan |
lines.english: O physician, you are a competent physician, if you first diagnose the disease.

lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਦਾਰੂ ਲੋੜਿ ਲਹੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਵੰਞੈ ਰੋਗਾ ਘਾਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: aisaa daaroo lorr lahu jit vanyai rogaa ghaan |
lines.english: Prescribe such a remedy, by which all sorts of illnesses may be cured.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਦਾਰੂ ਰੋਗ ਉਠਿਅਹਿ ਤਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਵਸੈ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: jit daaroo rog utthieh tan sukh vasai aae |
lines.english: Administer that medicine, which will cure the disease, and allow peace to come and dwell in the body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਗੁ ਗਵਾਇਹਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਵੈਦੁ ਸਦਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: rog gavaaeihi aapanaa ta naanak vaid sadaae |2|
lines.english: Only when you are rid of your own disease, O Nanak, will you be known as a physician. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮੇ ਦਿਤੇ ਬੇਦ ਪੂਜਾ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: brahame dite bed poojaa laaeaa |
lines.english: Brahma was given the Vedas, and enjoined to worship God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਬਿਸਨੁ ਮਹੇਸੁ ਦੇਵ ਉਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: brahamaa bisan mahes dev upaaeaa |
lines.english: Brahma, Vishnu, Shiva and the deities were created.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੈਤਾ ਮਾਰੇ ਧਾਇ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: daitaa maare dhaae hukam sabaaeaa |
lines.english: According to His Will, they quickly killed all the demons.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਸ ਅਵਤਾਰੀ ਰਾਮੁ ਰਾਜਾ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: das avataaree raam raajaa aaeaa |
lines.english: The ten incarnations, and Rama the king, came into being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਈਸ ਮਹੇਸੁਰੁ ਸੇਵ ਤਿਨੑੀ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ees mahesur sev tinaee ant na paaeaa |
lines.english: Shiva serves Him, but cannot find His limits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਇ ਤਖਤੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sachee keemat paae takhat rachaaeaa |
lines.english: He established His throne on the principles of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਨੀਆ ਧੰਧੈ ਲਾਇ ਆਪੁ ਛਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: duneea dhandhai laae aap chhapaaeaa |
lines.english: He enjoined all the world to its tasks, while He keeps Himself hidden from view.
